title: [setup] Scaffold the Rust workspace and contributor rules
body:
**Category:** setup
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** None
**Produces:** `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`, `AGENTS.md`, `crates/moria-world/Cargo.toml`, `crates/moria-world/src/lib.rs`, `crates/moria-demo/Cargo.toml`, `crates/moria-demo/src/main.rs`, `crates/moria-bench/Cargo.toml`, `crates/moria-bench/src/main.rs`, `crates/moria-curate/Cargo.toml`, `crates/moria-curate/src/main.rs`

## Description

Create the four-package Rust 2024/Bevy 0.19 workspace, thin crate entry points, required dependencies, Cargo profiles, root asset directories, and the exact repository operating rules required for later agents. Implements the repository design document and all TDD files.

## Inputs

What must exist before this issue can be worked:
- `docs/tdd/overview.md` — selected stack, package tree, profiles, and exact `AGENTS.md` contents

## Acceptance Criteria

Specific, testable conditions. The issue is done when ALL of these are true:
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace` succeeds for all four packages with a committed lockfile.
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` contains every required command, naming rule, public-boundary rule, schedule rule, and feasibility-gate rule from the TDD.
- [ ] The root profiles use dev opt-level 1, dependency opt-level 3, and release thin LTO with one codegen unit.
- [ ] Tests exist and pass
- [ ] No regressions — all existing tests still pass
